entry.title: SAP Fiori launchpad: Hiding empty spaces and pages
entry.content:
What is this feature about?

Overview

Hiding empty spaces and pages is a new feature of SAP Fiori launchpad.

Essentially, this means that empty spaces and pages are removed from the space menu and are no longer shown in the App Finder.

To be more precise, if pages or spaces are empty—meaning they don’t contain any (1) role-based content or (2) device-type-based content—then it makes no sense to expose them. In such cases, it would serve no purpose for users to access them.

Benefits

The key benefit of this approach is that it enhances the user experience by preventing end users from encountering empty content.

Additionally, this feature gives administrators greater flexibility. They can organize content without worrying about creating empty pages or spaces since such pages will automatically be hidden from end users.

Restriction

End user personalization is not considered, mainly to optimize performance.

If a page is empty and users personalized it while the feature is disabled, enabling the feature later will cause that page to disappear, as only the original content defined by the administrators is considered.

Similarly, if users remove all tiles from a page through personalization, making it empty, the page won’t be hidden because it became empty due to user actions.

 

How to enable this feature?

As an administrator, it is possible to enable or disable the display of empty spaces and pages by toggling the parameter ‘SPACES_HIDE_EMPTY_SPACES_PAGES’ using the 'Manage Launchpad Settings' application.

  • If the toggle is ON, the space menu should hide any empty spaces and pages.
  • If the toggle is OFF, the space menu shows all spaces and pages, regardless of their content. 

 

To enable or disable this setting, users must Edit and Save it. The changes to this configuration will take effect only after a refresh.

NOTE

  • This feature is available with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 (refer to the official  documentation here), Integrated Business Planning 2502 & BTP ABAP environment / Steampunk 2502.
  • This feature will be offered as opt-in in this initial release, i.e. disabled by default.
  • This feature is also planned to be delivered with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2025 (on-premise).

entry.title: SAP's Point of View – Expanding Scope of SAP AFC
entry.content:
Financial closing is a critical process for every organization, and it can also be a complex, time-consuming task for accountants. Accountants face challenges like managing multiple data sources, ensuring data accuracy, and meeting tight deadlines. The lack of standardization and automation can lead to errors and delays in the closing process.

SAP recognizes these challenges and provides a comprehensive solution that streamlines the entire record to report process. SAP Advanced Financial Closing (SAP AFC), a key component of SAP's financial solutions portfolio, is set to expand its capabilities beyond the entity close, providing enterprise-wide intelligent automation and orchestration for accounting teams. SAP solution extensions by BlackLine smartly extend SAP Cloud ERP processes that address unique pain points related to particularly complex organizations, often with a mix of SAP and non-SAP ERP systems. By bringing SAP AFC together with the accounting add-ons by BlackLine, a single vantage point can be used to optimize record-to-report activities across even the most complex customer landscapes.

Visibility into all Cloud ERP activities across record-to-report

Today, SAP AFC provides powerful intelligent automation to help finance teams improve governance and compliance, drive efficiency, and gain transparency for tasks across record-to-report. It serves as a closing “hub” that gives teams a unified reporting view and can execute tasks across the SAP ERP landscape (SAP ECC, SAP S/4HANA, SAP S/4HANA Cloud, SAP Business Technology Platform). 

With the universal journal capabilities provided by SAP S/4HANA Cloud, certain accounting tasks can be moved forward from period-end into the business period to allocate work more smoothly across the period. Automated runs that perform matching and automate residual follow-on postings for goods and invoice receipt reconciliation and intercompany reconciliation transactions can similarly be scheduled, executed, and reported with SAP AFC. Companies benefit from standardized, automated treatment of these cases, with configurable approval steps and automated documentation.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud has strong balance validation capabilities that can be initiated by business users. Accountants set rules that are executed automatically; the system sends notifications when thresholds are exceeded. These validations can be performed at certain points during the period or pre-close to check posting progress, or towards the end of the close as an internal financial control. As they are highly automated, these validations serve as a critical control mechanism for a successful close that does not strain accountants’ time.

Finance teams are embracing technology, including using bots to eliminate manual errors related to repetitive manual tasks. SAP AFC can orchestrate and coordinate SAP Process Automation bots as part of task chains including  accessing and preparing data or the mass creation of master data. SAP AFC sends notifications as required and gives the business owner of the financial close the oversight of bot statuses. SAP Process Automation workflows can also be used to route specific manual follow-up tasks or approvals through your organization. These workflows are embedded into SAP AFC-monitored process chains for visibility; this eliminates the alternative email-centric workaround processes that often result in stalled job chains and delays.

When the entity close is complete, complex organizations move to the group closing and statutory reporting part of the record-to-report process. Many companies orchestrate SAP Intercompany Matching and Reconciliation via SAP AFC, and there are customers already using SAP AFC to monitor certain tasks in SAP S/4HANA Finance for group reporting. Later this year, SAP plans to make group reporting-specific parameters available to the business users utilizing the SAP AFC closing task list. As is the case for entity-related activities, companies will be able to use integrated workflow and notification capabilities for corporate close tasks, as well as be able to add notes and attachments to document group close tasks comprehensively.

Since the release of SAP AFC, companies have been managing specific statutory reporting tasks such as local sales reporting using task execution and team collaboration capabilities. Any series of steps that need to be performed, in a particular order by accountants, can benefit from SAP AFC’s workflow, automated documentation of task performance, and reporting capabilities.

Going beyond Cloud ERP

In the future, SAP AFC’s task-execution triggers and status reporting will cover the full spectrum of activities in the record-to-report process, regardless of whether they are performed in an SAP system.

Many companies post a large volume of journal entries at period-end to account for situations not covered by integrated logistical processes. In the first half of 2025, SAP plans to release new SAP Business AI capabilities that will reduce the effort related to certain manual journal types, like provisions and accruals. However, e

When the accounting period ends, many companies have external data sources that require account reconciliations. SAP Account Substantiation and Automation by BlackLine provides a highly automated approach that gives accountants exactly the data they need to perform the reconciliations efficiently – with a focus on the riskiest accounts. These reconciliation steps are key parts of closing – sometimes as a pre-requisite for other tasks, and sometimes as key internal controls. SAP AFC can place these reconciliations in context, triggering reconciliations as part of the larger closing task model. Status information on reconciliation performance is made available both for triggering next steps and for maintaining a central view of the close for finance managers.

SAP accounting add-ons by BlackLine provides tailored support for a particular subset of reconciliation activities, including transaction matching. The SAP Account Substantiation and Automation by BlackLine, transaction matching option gives accountants a generic matching capability that can be used to match data sets automatically, with an integrated capability to help remedy mismatches with well-documented journal entries. These matching tasks can also be a part of SAP AFC task lists.

A specific challenge companies face with multiple data sources is executing closing tasks in non-SAP systems. SAP and BlackLine are working together so that accounting teams will have visibility into the closing tasks in non-SAP systems. BlackLine plans to provide standardized integration connectors to non-SAP ERP systems for fast time-to-value, and the status information will be made visible in SAP AFC to trigger follow-on record-to-report activities.

 

Vision for SAP AFC across SAP ERP and non-SAP ERP financial closing activities

Regardless of where your closing activities take place, SAP Advanced Financial Closing will be the one-stop-shop for monitoring and executing an effective financial close. Since its launch as the strategic solution for the financial close, SAP has demonstrated a strong commitment and roadmap for SAP AFC creating SAP’s strategic cloud-based orchestration and intelligent automation hub for record-to-report.

Boundless Closing with SAP AFC

By leveraging intelligent technologies such as SAP Business AI, SAP Process Automation, and strong integration with SAP solution extensions by BlackLine, SAP AFC can automate repetitive tasks, reduce manual effort, and minimize the risk of errors. This enables accountants to focus on higher-value activities and provide more strategic insights to the business. With SAP AFC, organizations can achieve a faster, more accurate, and more efficient financial close – across their SAP and non-SAP landscapes, ultimately leading to better decision-making and improved financial performance.

You can learn more about SAP Advanced Financial Closing in the dedicated SAP Community group or on sap.com.

entry.title: Upload of a custom logo to be displayed in an SAP Fiori launchpad shell
entry.content:
What is this feature about?

Overview

This feature enables users to replace the standard SAP logo with a custom logo by uploading an image file in the SAP Fiori launchpad.

As a result, the SAP Fiori launchpad shell can display a customized logo.

Benefits

Previously, customizing a logo required using custom themes via the UI theme designer to create these themes and replace the standard SAP logo with a customer-specific one. With this new feature, the benefit is a significant reduction in the administrative effort needed to update the logo in the SAP Fiori launchpad shell.

Restriction

Even though this feature allows customization of the logo to be displayed in the SAP Fiori launchpad shell, users are unable to revert to the original SAP logo once it’s replaced. Nevertheless, they have the option to replace the uploaded custom logo with another new image file if needed.

How to enable this feature?

As an administrator, it is possible to upload an image file as company logo using the parameter ‘COMPANY_LOGO_URL’ via the 'Manage Launchpad Settings' application as depicted in the screenshots below.

 

This parameter allows users to add their logo to all themes, including SAP standard themes and custom themes. The uploaded custom logo always takes precedence over any other logos (for e.g a logo defined by the custom theme).

It is also possible to maintain an accessible text for the custom logo using the parameter ‘COMPANY_LOGO_ACCESSIBLE_TEXT’.

This ensures that all users, including those with disabilities, can understand its purpose. This can be done by adding descriptive alt text (for e.g "CompanyName Logo, link to homepage") to aid in navigation and understanding.

To update the above two settings, users must Edit and Save it. The changes to the configurations will take effect only after a refresh.

NOTE

  • This feature is available with SAP S/4HANA Cloud public Edition 2408 (refer to the official documentation here), Integrated Business Planning 2408 & BTP ABAP environment / Steampunk 2408.
  • This feature is also planned to be delivered with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2025 (on-premise).

entry.title: Setup Resource Management Capability in SAP Projects and Resource Management
entry.content:
Effective Project and Resource Management (PRM) is essential for delivering successful projects in today’s dynamic business environment. SAP SPRM enables organizations to strategically match skilled resources to project demands, optimizing resource utilization and aligning with business goals. 

 

Key Features 

  1. Resource Profiles

    • Enables resources to create profiles showcasing their skills, experience, and availability, simplifying staffing decisions for resource managers. 

  2. Project Data Integration 

    • Facilitates real-time replication of project demands from SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition for efficient staffing. 

  3. Centralized Request Management 

    • Manage multiple project resource requests in a single place, improving transparency and efficiency. 

  4. Advanced Resource Staffing 

    • Offers skill-based matching, availability checks, and resource utilization tracking. 

  5. Boost Resource Utilization 

    • Minimizes idle time and maximizes productivity by aligning resources with project demands. 

 

 

Licensing Information 

Resource Management Capability in SAP Project and Resource Managment is a separately licensed scope item in addition to SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition.  

  1. Pricing: 

    • Based on Full Use Equivalent (FUE) per month. 

    • Pro-rated monthly pricing for contracts shorter than a year. 

  2. Payment Methods: 

    • Invoice (all countries) or credit card (region-specific). 

  3. Supported Languages: 

    • Includes English, Chinese, French, German, Japanese, and more. 

  4. Flexible Licensing: 

    • Scalable for businesses of all sizes, from small teams to multi-regional enterprises. 

For more details, visit SAP RM Page. 

 

 

Integration Prerequisites 

To facilitate smooth communication and data exchange, the following prerequisites should be met.

  • Mandatory: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition for project demand replication. 
  • Optional: Integration with SAP SuccessFactors for talent profiles and workforce capability. 
    • Customers can leverage either SAP SuccessFactors or SAP S/4HANA Cloud for talent management. 

 

 

Scope Item Activation 

Activate the following to enable project replication and resource management: 

  • J11: Customer Project Management - Project-Based Services. 
  • 1A8: Internal Project Management - Project-Based Services. 
  • 6JO: Resource Management for Projects. 
  • J54: Overhead Cost Accounting (for cost center replication). 

Verification Steps: 

  1. Manage Your Solution App: View solution scope via SAP Fiori. 

     

  2. SAP Central Business Configuration: In the Scope and Organizational Structure phase, navigate to the Activities tab. Search for Define Scope. 

Helpful SAP Notes and KBAs: 

  • SAP Note 2819010: How to check if a scope item is activated in the system. 
  • SAP Note 3045179: Request to activate scope items. 

 

Subscription to Resource Management Capability 

To effectively subscribe to the Resource Management Capability, follow these steps outlined to ensure a successful subscription:

Steps to subscribe: 

  1. Access SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) cockpit. 
  2. Navigate to the Service Marketplace and search for "Resource Management".
  3. Select plan as Standard, subscribe, and launch the app. 

 

 

Guided Workflow for RM Setup 

The resource management application requires integration with SAP cloud solutions to replicate and exchange data, leading to several manual steps. These steps have been combined into a guided workflow, delivered through the Cloud Integration Automation Service (CIAS).

The Cloud Integration Automation Service  offers an automated workflow for integration. 

Steps: 

  1. Log into SAP for Me → Systems & Provisioning dashboard -> -> Overview tab, locate the Landscape Applications card -> Maintenance Planner. 
  2. Use the Maintenance Planner to plan integration. On the home page of Maintenance Planner, choose Plan for Cloud Integration Scenario. 
  3. Search for "Resource Management capability in SAP Project and Resource Management(6JO)" and choose tenants for integration. 
  4. Select a tenant for each of the systems you want to integrate and choose Generate Workflow. 

Note: In case you are not onboarded to enhanced maintenance planner, then Plan for Cloud Integration may not be available. Please follow the SAP KBA 2921927 to get it resolved. 

 

 

Set Up the Communication in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition for Project Replication

To successfully replicate project data from SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, it is essential to configure the communication settings accurately.  

Communication Scenario 

Direction 

Related Scope Item 

Resource Management in SAP Project and Resource Management - API Integration (SAP_COM_0A11) 

Inbound 

Resource Management for Projects (6JO) 

Resource Management in SAP Project and Resource Management - UI Integration (SAP_COM_0840) 

Outbound 

Resource Management for Projects (6JO) 

 

Step 1: Create Communication Users 

  1. Access the System 

    1. Log in to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system with an authorized user account that possesses the SAP_BR_ADMINISTRATOR role. 

  2. Maintain Communication Users 

    1. Open the Maintain Communication Users application. 

    2. Create a new user with the following details: 

      • Username: Enter a unique username. 

      • Description: Provide a descriptive label for the user. 

  3. Select Authentication Method

    1. Password-Based Authentication: 

      • Input a secure password or use the Propose Password option. 

      • Note: Passwords must be a minimum of 20 characters and include at least one special character. 

    2. Certificate-Based Authentication: 

      • Upload an X.509 client certificate signed by an authorized certification authority. 

      • Refer to SAP Note 2801396 for details on approved certification authorities. 

    3. Recommendation: For enhanced security, use certificate-based authentication. 

  4. Save the User Configuration 

 

Step 2: Create Communication Systems 

  1. For Data Exchange with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition: 

    1. System ID: e.g., S4HANA. 

    2. System Name: Provide a meaningful name. 

    3. Host Name: Enter the host name of your SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system (e.g., myxxxxxx.s4hana.ondemand.com or myxxxxxx.s4hana.cloud.sap). Replace <myxxxxxx> with your system’s specific host name. 

    4. Inbound Communication User: Assign the user created in the previous step. 

  2. For Navigation from Launchpad to Resource Management: 

    1. System ID: e.g., RM. 

    2. System Name: Provide a descriptive name. 

    3. Host Name: Input the subscription URL for the Resource Management application on the SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP). 

Step 3: Create Communication Arrangements 

  1. API Integration Finalization with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition: 

    1. Open the Communication Arrangements application and select New. 

    2. Scenario: Choose SAP_COM_0A11 (Resource Management - API Integration). 

    3. Arrangement Name: Input a unique name. 

    4. Assign the communication system created for data exchange in Step 2. 

    5. Note: The username will populate automatically. Save the arrangement. 


  2. UI Integration Setup for Resource Management Navigation: 

    1. Open the Communication Arrangements application and select New. 

    2. Scenario: Choose SAP_COM_0840 (Resource Management - UI Integration). 

    3. Arrangement Name: Input a unique name. 

    4. Assign the communication system created for launchpad navigation in Step 2. 

    5. Save the arrangement. 

 

 

Integration with SAP Cloud ALM 

SAP RM integrates with SAP Cloud ALM for monitoring and managing master/transactional data replication. 

Steps: 

  1. Verify that the resource management service is listed in the Landscape Management app of SAP Cloud ALM. 
  2. Activate monitoring data collection. Follow the instructions in the topic Activate the Monitoring Data Collection on the page Activate the Monitoring Data Collection for Integration in  SAP Project and Resource Management, resource management capability. Other sections such as Customize the Monitoring Data Collection are optional. 

Refer to the SAP Cloud ALM setup guide for additional configuration details. 

 

 

User Management  

To configure user management for resource management, you need to define roles and assign role collections to users. 

Note: When you register your subaccount in your identity provider, you must ensure that the user attribute E-Mail has the assertion attribute mail. This mapping is essential for the use of the My Project Experience app. 

 

Role Template 

Description 

Available Attributes 

Tiles on SAP Fiori Launchpad 

RequesterSuperuser 

Users can create and manage resource requests for all processing resource organizations. 

Assign this super user role to the existing role collection that authorizes users to create and manage resource requests for all requested resource organizations. 

Not applicable 

Manage Resource Requests 

ResourceManagerSuperuser 

Users can staff all resource requests and view resource utilization. 

Assign this super user role to the existing role collection that authorizes users to staff resource requests and view resource utilization for all processing resource organizations. 

Not applicable 

Staff Resource Requests 

Manage Resource Utilization 

My Resources 

Requester 

Users can create and manage resource requests for authorized resource organizations. 

RequestedResourceOrganization 

Manage Resource Requests 

ResourceManager 

Users can staff resource requests and view the resource utilization for authorized resource organizations. 

ProcessingResourceOrganization 

Staff Resource Requests 

Manage Resource Utilization 

My Resources 

ProjectTeamMember 

Users can update their own project experience. 

Not applicable 

My Project Experience 

My Assignments 

ResourceManagementAdministrator 

Users can set the default language for language-dependent master data. 

Not applicable 

Set Default Language 

MyAssignmentEditor 

Users can update their assignments. 

Not applicable 

My Assignments 

 

You have the following options to configure the attributes: 

  • Unrestricted: The role is authorized for all resource organizations. 
    Note: The unrestricted access option for the roles Requester and ResourceManager are not available anymore. Use the super user role templates RequesterSuperuser and ResourceManagerSuperuser instead. 
  • Static: The role is authorized for the resource organizations you specify. Ensure you enter the IDs of the resource organizations, which have 5 characters and can be looked up in the Manage Resource Organizations app. 

Note: Requester and RequesterSuperuser roles should not be assigned together to same users. Same with ResourceManager and  ResourceManagerSuperuser.

entry.title: Artificial Intelligence & Technology in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502
entry.content:
Welcome to my blog post on Artificial Intelligence and Technologies, showcasing the groundbreaking innovations in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Release 2502. In this release, we are thrilled to unveil a series of advanced AI-powered features that redefine how businesses interact with their enterprise systems. From Joule, our intelligent AI copilot, to AI-assisted financial insights, and natural language-driven functionalities, these capabilities are designed to elevate user productivity, streamline decision-making, and unlock new levels of operational efficiency. A heartfelt thank you to our talented developers and visionaries for their dedication to driving innovation forward!

Watch my video for an overview of the top new features:

 

 

Joule: The AI Copilot

Video: Create Customized Insight Card with Joule

 

Video: Search Open Sale Order with Joule

 

Joule is now generally available and seamlessly integrated in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition after being in early adoption program. SAP’s AI copilot Joule leverages generative AI to empower users to execute their everyday tasks more efficiently and use natural language to express their business need.

Value Proposition

  • Enables quick navigation to applications for seamless task execution.
  • Delivers instant insights into critical business data, such as purchase orders.
  • Provides concise summaries of user enablement content for faster task completion.
  • Simplifies personalization of the "My Home" page, improving user productivity.

Capabilities 

  • Recommends relevant applications to users and facilitates seamless navigation.
  • Offers insights about business objects and situations without requiring users to open separate applications.
  • Summarizes help content to answer queries expressed in natural language.
  • Allows users to create preview cards directly in Joule and add them to the "My Home" Insights section.

For more information, see: Joule Capabilities in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

 

Financial Business Insights for Group Financial Statements (Beta)

This feature, currently in beta, introduces cutting-edge capabilities to simplify complex financial reporting. By integrating AI, it helps businesses uncover insights and improve collaboration.


Value Proposition:

  • Supports strategic decisions by explaining complex financial KPIs and merging insights with user comments.
  • Streamlines financial reporting with contextualized summaries of critical data.
  • Enhances collaboration and clarity in financial reviews.

Capabilities:

  • Leverages generative AI to summarize data sets and calculate context-relevant KPIs.
  • Combines data with user comments for richer summaries.
  • Provides filtering and navigation tools based on business insights.

 

Joule for Situation Handling

The integration of SAP's AI copilot Joule with Situation Handling enables users to receive up-to-date information on demand. Joule displays relevant issues, shares additional information, and directs users to the appropriate apps, ensuring a continuous overview of responsibilities while working on their daily tasks.

Value Proposition:

  • Offers intelligent assistance for rapid decision-making and issue resolution.
  • Proactively identifies and addresses issues to avoid operational disruptions or financial risks.

Capabilities:

  • Ask Joule to identify situations requiring attention and provides contextual information.
  • Proposes solutions and directs users to related applications for streamlined resolution.

 

Generative AI Recommendations for Situation Handling

This feature leverages generative AI to provide context-specific recommendations, tailored to streamline decision-making with targeted recommendations for Situation Handling.
Value Proposition:

  • Delivers context-specific recommendations tailored to users’ responsibilities.
  • Enhances operational performance by reducing response times and streamlining decisions.

Capabilities:

  • "My Situations - Extended" app with AI-generated recommendations.
  • Integrates recommendation services with external data via large language models (LLMs).
  • Provides actionable suggestions based on data context and user responsibilities.

 

Intelligent Scenario Lifecycle Management (ISLM) for Generative AI Use Cases

 

SAP enhances its AI framework with ISLM, providing a robust structure for managing AI use cases. This feature facilitate adoption of generative AI in SAP S/4HANA by managing SAP-delivered and custom AI use cases within a centralized, end-to-end framework.


Value Proposition:

  • Integrate business applications with large language models, simplifying AI implementation and enabling customers and partners to develop custom use cases for transforming core business processes
  • Provide support for predelivered generative AI-based use cases in RISE with SAP
  • Allow the delivery of integrated ISLM and ABAP AI SDK experience, enabling development of generative AI-based use cases, including custom creation
  • Enable turnkey auto-activation for generative AI-based use cases

Capabilities:

  • Manages AI use cases throughout their lifecycle, from exploration to activation.
  • Supports both narrow AI and generative AI use cases.
  • Offers turnkey auto-activation for rapid implementation of AI solutions.

 

AI-Assisted Smart Summarization

AI-assisted smart summarization allows you to summarize object pages of SAP Fiori elements-based applications with the help of the power of generative AI.

The summarization can be reviewed and modified in a rich text editor and easily copied into productivity tools, such as email or chat, for follow-ups with co-workers and customers.

Value Proposition

  • Better understanding of business data
  • Time saving when preparing business data for follow ups
  • Trustworthy AI results
  • Easy editing
  • Efficient sharing

Capabilities

  • Selection of sections to be summarized
  • Well-structured output
  • Rich text editor for review and edits
  • Copy to clipboard for follow-ups
  • Possibility to leave sentiment of the feature

 

AI-Assisted Easy Filter

AI-assisted easy filter allows you to filter list reports of SAP Fiori elements-based applications through natural language with the help of the power of generative AI.

Instead of manually setting the filter values through type ahead and value helps, you type your search query into the filter field, and you can easily access recent filter queries and favorite queries as well.

Value Proposition

  • Better understanding of business data
  • Time saving when filtering based on known filter criteria
  • Trustworthy AI results
  • Intuitive, click-efficient user experience, especially for new users

Capabilities

  • Filtering based on natural language
  • Support of filter fields that are available, but not visible in the filter bar
  • Complex filters like amount and currency, date ranges, etc. are supported
  • Adjustment of the filters in the filter tokens
  • Access to recent filter queries
  • Support to mark recent filters as favorites

 

AI-Assisted Easy Enterprise Search

AI-assisted easy enterprise search allows you to use natural language through the power of generative AI to search for business objects across the solution by simply typing your search query in the search field of the SAP Fiori launchpad. 

Value Proposition

  • Time saving when searching for known criteria
  • Trustworthy AI results
  • Intuitive, click-efficient user experience, especially for new users
  • Easy to activate on end-user level

Capabilities

  • Setting for activation / de-activation of the natural language search capability on individual end-user level
  • Natural language support of the search field in the SAP Fiori launchpad
  • Indication that natural language search is enabled in the search field itself

Please register to be part of the SAP Beta Testing of the Newest AI-assisted user experience features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

 

AI-Assisted Smart Personalization of My Home

AI-assisted smart personalization of My Home allows you to use natural language through the power of generative AI to add insights cards to your My Home experience.

Starting on My Home directly, you can add insights cards using natural language in two clicks including a preview to let the end user review the result generated by AI.

Value Proposition

  • Time saving when adding insights cards
  • Better insights into business data
  • Trustworthy AI results
  • Intuitive, click-efficient user experience, especially for new users

Capabilities

  • One-click action from My Home to trigger the addition of insights cards
  • Support of nine SAP Fiori elements-based apps as basis for insights cards creation during Beta testing
  • Preview during addition of insights cards to ensure data quality and consistency

Please register to be part of the SAP Beta Testing of the Newest AI-assisted user experience features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

 

AI-Assisted Error Explanation

AI-assisted error explanation supports in understanding errors in SAP Fiori elements-based applications better and provides you with first recommendations how to solve the errors by leveraging the power of generative AI.

Directly embedded in the current error visualization, it gives you the opportunity to generate explanations only when required.

Value Proposition

  • Time saving when solving errors
  • Intuitively integrated into the current error visualization
  • Better insights into errors and recommended solutions
  • Intuitive, click-efficient user experience, especially for new users

Capabilities

  • One-click action from current error visualization to trigger the explanation
  • Well-structured result of the error explanation containing the explanatory part as well as the recommendations part
  • Possibility to leave sentiment of the feature

Please register to be part of the SAP Beta Testing of the Newest AI-assisted user experience features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

 

The Future of Business, Today: Get Your Access to AI-Assisted Features Thanks to this Limited Promotion Now! 

The 2502 update is a strategic investment that combines advanced AI with powerful enterprise management tools. Whether scaling your business, enhancing productivity, or building sustainable operations, its capabilities help support a more agile and resilient future.

Sign up for following features through the limited Promotion for AI-assisted Features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (for all countries, customers, and partners):

  • The easy filter and smart summarization features in SAP Fiori allow for efficient, natural language filtering of business data and seamless summarization capabilities, enabling users to quickly extract relevant information and jump-start subsequent collaboration. 
  • Facilitate easier understanding and interpretation of financial data with insights from cost center reviews and explanations of fixed-asset depreciation keys.

 

📽️ Watch the Replays of Our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 Early Release Series!   

Between January 21 and January 24, we conducted a series of 21 engaging live sessions to showcase the thrilling innovations included in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 release. If you missed the live sessions, don't worry! You can still access the whole series or select the sessions that interest you the most. Seize this opportunity to watch them on demand at your convenience–anywhere, anytime.  

  

🔎Find All of Our Assets   

SAP S/4HANA Cloud is the foundation of the intelligent, sustainable enterprise and is an innovative, robust, and scalable ERP. We at Cloud ERP Product Success and Cloud Co-Innovation offer a service as versatile as our product itself. Check out the numerous offerings our team has created for you below:   

Link: https://chart-bdmaicr0au.dispatcher.eu2.hana.ondemand.com/index.html?hc_reset

entry.title: Sourcing & Procurement in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502
entry.content:
Hello procurement folks,

please welcome SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Release 2502. In the fast-paced world of business, a smooth procurement process can make all the difference. These days, that efficiency comes down to having the right software. In this post, we'll take a look at the latest procurement updates and explore how these advancements can simplify your operations, cut costs, and ultimately boost your bottom line. Watch the video and find the top highlights of this release.

For other releases please see here.

Operational Procurement

  • Punchout Capability for Supplier hosted Catalogs
  • Enabling partner functions in the Purchase Order API

SAP Ariba Central Procurement

  • Mass Change of Price Scales in Central Purchase Contracts
  • Support of Enhanced Limit in Central Supplier Confirmation
  • Central Procurement with SAP Business Network for Procurement (6BJ)

Invoice Management

  • Alternative Reconciliation Account
  • My Inbox: CDS Based Custom Attributes for Supplier Invoices

SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management

  • Use of Document Information Extraction templates
  • Supporting different start and step conditions (amount, PO-based, credit memo)
  • Automatic reprocessing of invoices with missing receipts

Operational Procurement

Punchout Capability for Supplier hosted Catalogs

The base edition of SAP Ariba Buying delivers a smart and simple purchasing experience designed to make it easier for S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition customers to jumpstart their path to best-in-class procurement performance, paving the way for broader digital transformation whenever your business is ready.

SAP Ariba Buying creates a simple, smart, and elegant purchasing experience that increases user engagement for indirect material procurement.  The newly added punch-out functionality enables buyers to directly access and purchase goods/services from catalog's maintained and hosted by the suppliers. This allows buyers to quickly add items from external stores to their shopping cart and initiate a purchase request that follows the approval process configured. Access real-time information on pricing and availability from external stores during the buying process. 

You wonder how this is being set up? The punchout catalogs are configured in the configuration section of SAP Ariba Buying, Base Edition via Manage Shopping Sites , here you have to configure every details of the punchout catalog like authentication, URL etc. For more information, see: Adding a Supplier Store

Enabling partner functions in the Purchase Order API

Partner functions enable to manage the relationships of different suppliers. Certain partner functions be maintained in the business partner (supplier), which can be copied to the procurement documents under each respective Purchasing Organization. With this innovation, the Purchase Order OData V4 API can be used to send the partner function fields. Use the OData V4 API 'CE_PURCHASEORDER_0001' to create, update, read, and delete partner functions in the purchase order header. For more information, see: Purchase Order (CE_PURCHASEORDER_0001) and Purchase Order (OData V4).

back to top

SAP Ariba Central Procurement

Mass Change of Price Scales in Central Purchase Contracts

We increase the flexibility and usability for mass managing of central purchase contracts. This innovation is an extension of the existing mass change capability for central purchase contracts through offline Microsoft Excel upload. SAP Ariba Central Procurement now also supports the update and creation of price scale values for condition types configured for price scale maintenance. Furthermore, purchasers can now choose to only upload changes in preparation mode and releasing those through a later mass update. Support for additional fields by the offline Excel upload including:

  • Numerator and denominator on item level
  • Planned delivery duration on item level
  • Item category on item level
  • Unit of measurement conversion on price-condition level
  • Incoterms classification and location 1 on distribution level 

For more information, see: Mass Changes to Central Purchase Contracts

Support of Enhanced Limit in Central Supplier Confirmation

With this release, you can now create a central supplier confirmation for a centrally managed purchase order with E (Enhanced Limit) in the 'Manage Central Supplier Confirmations' app. You can add, view and change confirmation items of item categories Standard (blank), lean services and E (Enhanced Limit).  The Enhanced Limit is an item category in a purchase order that can be used to order unplanned services and that is defined by a maximum amount.

Central Procurement with SAP Business Network for Procurement (6BJ)

We are happy to speed up procurement processes with the integration of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with SAP Business Network through SAP Integration Suite. Central purchasers can now create central purchase orders in the central procurement hub system by pooling purchase orders from connected systems, such as SAP ERP, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, SAP S/4HANA or ECC. The purchase orders are sent to SAP Business Network and the required suppliers are notified. Suppliers submit their order confirmation through SAP Business Network. The supplier's order confirmation is sent from SAP Business Network to either hub or connected system. As soon as the supplier starts the release and approval process for a purchase order, the status is updated in the connected system. For more information, see: 'Central Procurement with SAP Business Network for Procurement' and 'Setting Up Central Procurement with SAP Business Network for Procurement' and SAP Knowledge Base Article here.

back to top

Invoice Management

Alternative Reconciliation Account

Accounts payable accountants can now enter predefined values into the G/L account field on the details screen of the Create Supplier Invoice – Advanced app. The same applies to the reconciliation account field under general information in the Manage Supplier Invoices app. In the Import Supplier Invoices app, the downloaded template now includes the field reconciliation account. Upfront, the configuration expert needs to define the alternative reconciliation accounts allowed for each reconciliation account via SSCUI 'Define Alternative Reconciliation Accounts' (SSCUI ID 102631). For more information, see: Alternative Reconciliation

 

My Inbox: CDS Based Custom Attributes for Supplier Invoices

Your manager needs more information during his daily workflow tasks: As a configuration expert, you can now include custom attributes from the CDS entity I_SupplierInvoiceAPI01 in the expert view in the My Inbox app. Check out the configuration interface 'Maintain CDS Based Custom Attributes' (SSCUI ID 106664). For more information, see: My Inbox and My Inbox Expert View 

back to top

SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management

Use of Document Information Extraction templates

Document Information Extraction service integrated with SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management is an OCR based solution (ML) that enables to automatically extract data from an incoming supplier invoice (PDF or image). The use of Document Information Extraction templates allows users to extract information from invoices, based on the specific layout used by each supplier. These templates help the machine learning model to better identify and extract data fields from invoices that were initially missed or incorrectly processed. This leads to more accurate and efficient data extraction.

When uploading an invoice in the inbound flow of Central Invoice Management, a field on the invoice is not correctly detected. The power user then fixes the extraction results in the document and assigns it to a template. This trains the machine learning model to recognize the correct layout. Once a new invoice - with the same complex layout - is uploaded, the information will be extracted with higher confidence. Now, without any manual adjustments, the invoice can be posted in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. This significantly streamlines the process and reduces manual intervention, making invoice management more efficient and reliable. 

Document Information Extraction Templates app is available without any activation required. However, users must be granted with some new authorizations to be able to see and use it. For more information, see:Use Document Information Extraction Templates

Supporting different start and step conditions (amount, PO-based, credit memo)

We increase flexibility by introducing more conditions to initiate the approval workflow because different invoices require different customer-specific approval. We enable customers to define the best approval process for each situation by enabling the common information model (CIM) to deliver several approval criteria that could be used as part of start and step conditions: 

  • Invoice is based on Purchase Order
  • Invoice contains at least one non-purchase order item
  • Supplier invoice type is credit memo
  • Gross Amount in company code currency

For more information, see New Start and Step Conditions for Approval Workflow

Automatic reprocessing of invoices with missing receipts

You can now activate automatic reprocessing of invoices with missing receipts within the 'Manage Processing Services' app. When you enable this process, you can determine the number of reprocessing cycles for invoices with missing receipts. This feature allows for better visibility of invoice statuses and reduces the number of invoices which require manual invoice processing. During the Reference Object Matching process step, the system checks for any missing receipts, either goods receipts or service entry sheets. If no receipt is posted for a purchase order item marked for goods receipt-based invoice verification, the receipt is recognized as missing. The system then moves to the new process step, awaiting receipts. For more information, see : Automatic Reprocessing of Invoices with Missing Receipts

Looking for more innovations on SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management? Check this out: 2502 

back to top

Don’t hesitate to leave a comment and check out our community page to ask your questions and engage with the experts. Follow the PSCC_Enablement tag to stay up to date with our latest blog posts. 

Follow us on @SAP and #S4HANA, and myself on LinkedIn 🙂

More innovation can be found in the What's new viewer

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🚀The Future of Business, Today: Get Your Access to AI-Assisted Features Thanks to this Limited Promotion Now! 

The 2502 update is a strategic investment that combines advanced AI with powerful enterprise management tools. Whether scaling your business, enhancing productivity, or building sustainable operations, its capabilities help support a more agile and resilient future.

Sign up for following features through the limited Promotion for AI-assisted Features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (for all countries, customers, and partners):

  • The easy filter and smart summarization features in SAP Fiori allow for efficient, natural language filtering of business data and seamless summarization capabilities, enabling users to quickly extract relevant information and jump-start subsequent collaboration. 
  • Facilitate easier understanding and interpretation of financial data with insights from cost center reviews and explanations of fixed-asset depreciation keys.

😎Watch the Replays of Our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 Early Release Series!   

Between January 21 and January 24, we conducted a series of 21 engaging live sessions to showcase the thrilling innovations included in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 release. If you missed the live sessions, don't worry! You can still access the whole series or select the sessions that interest you the most. Seize this opportunity to watch them on demand at your convenience–anywhere, anytime.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud is the foundation of the intelligent, sustainable enterprise and is an innovative, robust, and scalable ERP. entry.title: Business processes in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with SAP Central Business Configuration
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Configuring Business Processes in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with SAP Central Business Configuration learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey will enable you to configure business processes in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with SAP Central Business Configuration.

Learning objectives

  • Set up the implementation projects for the development system tenants
  • Define the scope and country/region localizations
  • Select the primary finance settings and build the organizational structure
  • Define and transport product-specific configuration values
  • Create users and grant access to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Development System tenants
  • Create users and grant access to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Test and Production Systems

Prerequisites

  • Basic knowledge of SAP S/4HANA Cloud and SAP Central Business Configuration   

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit
